info.english_meaning: to breathe to be powerful to collect grains
info.hindI_arTa: bala yukta honA jInA DAnya saMcaya karanA dravya ko rokanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: prARanam = jIvanam  DAnyAvaroDanam = kusUlAdi - vyApAraH  prARanekarmakaH DAnyAvaroDane sakarmakaH
